TITLE: Apartment for rent – Edificio Kuna, San Antonio de Pereira
META_DESC: New apartment with 70 m² terrace, 2 parking spots and forest view in San Antonio de Pereira (Rionegro). Rent with SURA. HOA included. Pet friendly*.
